problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix — specifically Carbon nanotube alignment — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
